scenarios.name: pen_color_matches_color_scout
scenarios.rationale: Conversation attended to color; Color Scout's angle=color matches primary → +1.5. Shape Quest's angle=shape matches secondary → +0.75. Color wins.

scenarios.name: ladybug_shape_matches_shape_quest
scenarios.rationale: Conversation shifted to shape; Shape Quest primary matches, others don't on primary.

scenarios.name: lion_behavior_matches_voice_stage
scenarios.rationale: Voice Stage Lion is Tier A match; also angle=behavior matches primary. Tier A score (10) + signature bonus (1.5) dominates. entity_role=subject throughout, no pivot.

scenarios.name: no_conversation_signature_legacy_behavior
scenarios.rationale: No conversation_signature → no bonus from this plan. Existing Tier A beats Tier P (10 vs 7). Backwards-compatible.
